parsed.production_notes: The video is a continuous, real-life recording of an aquarium. The movement of the fish and water is natural, with no AI artifacts.

scenes.setting: Inside an aquarium, underwater, with rocks, sand, plants, and small fish. Cool blue lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: A wide shot of an underwater aquarium scene. The bottom is covered in light-colored sand with several smooth, round rocks of varying sizes scattered across it. A few small green aquatic plants are growing from the sand. In the background, there is a textured, dark rocky structure covered in patches of green algae or moss. Several small, slender fish, some with bright blue neon stripes, are swimming around in the mid-water and near the rocks. The lighting is a cool, deep blue, creating a serene underwater atmosphere.

scenes.visual_description: A continuous, single-shot video of an aquarium. The scene features a sandy bottom, smooth rocks, and small green plants. A dark, textured rock formation forms the backdrop. Small fish, including neon tetras, swim peacefully throughout the tank. The lighting is a cool blue. Text overlays appear and disappear throughout the video, first counting down in French, then providing a long scrolling English text about learning English by reading.
scenes.on_screen_text:
AMÉLIORE TON ANGLAIS EN LISANT DES LIVRES 10 MINUTES PAR JOUR (Improve your English by reading books 10 minutes a day)
3
2
1
Allons-y ! (Let's go!)
Reading is one of the easiest ways to begin — and with EWA, it becomes even more powerful. Studies show that people who read in English for just 10-15 minutes a day improve their vocabulary much faster than those who don't. Why does it work so well? Because reading gives you real English — natural phrases, real contexts, and words you'll actually use. With EWA, everything becomes even simpler: You get interactive bilingual books with instant translation, so you understand every sentence without stopping. You can choose stories you love — classics, bestsellers, business books, fantasy, romance, mystery, self-development, and more. And if you want to switch your format, you can move to audiobooks, movie scenes, or practice speaking with our AI Tutor. Just 10-15 minutes a day is enough to see real progress. Little by little, EWA helps you start thinking in English, not just studying it.
